basic_details.job_title: SUPPLYCO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Company Secretary, Senior Marketing Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Kerala State Civil Supplies Corporation Limited (SUPPLYCO)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the SUPPLYCO Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

age_limit.age_details: Company Secretary: Max 45 years. Senior Marketing Consultant: Max 55 years.
age_limit.details: Company Secretary: Maximum 45 years. Senior Marketing Consultant: Maximum 55 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Associate Company Secretary (ACS), Master's Degree, MBA Marketing
qualification.details: Company Secretary: Associate Company Secretary (ACS) with 5 years of post-qualification experience as a Company Secretary in a Government/Quasi Government/Registered Public or Private Sector Undertaking. Senior Marketing Consultant: Master's degree from a recognized university. Preference will be given to those having an MBA Marketing from a recognized university. Minimum 20 years of experience in the retail/FMCG sales sector, including senior management positions from reputed companies having an annual turnover of at least Rs.500 crore.

selection_process: Application screening Criteria-based screening Written test Group discussion Skill test/proficiency test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SUPPLYCO Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SUPPLYCO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SUPPLYCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the SUPPLYCO recruitment is 26th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Company Secretary and Senior Marketing Consultant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Company Secretary post is an Associate Company Secretary (ACS) with 5 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Marketing Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Marketing Consultant position is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs.73,600/- to Rs.90,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for SUPPLYCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly online through the official SUPPLYCO website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SUPPLYCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes application screening, criteria-based screening, written test, group discussion, skill test, and interview.

faq.question: Q9. When did the online application start for SUPPLYCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The online application for the SUPPLYCO recruitment started on 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply link?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
